payload.title: [MEDIUM] OIDC id_token decoded but never cryptographically verified
payload.description: oidc.js:168 derives identity from decodeIdToken with no JWKS signature check, no iss/aud/exp/nonce. Identity (sub/email) trusted from an unverified token. (GitHub is the configured provider, so reachability is lower today, but the OIDC path is live code.) FIX: verify signature via discovery JWKS + assert iss/aud/exp/nonce.
